name: DailyMed CIALIS tadalafil tablet prescribing information
authors: U.S. National Library of Medicine DailyMed
summary: Current U.S. CIALIS label revised March 2026, covering indications, dosing, contraindications, warnings, precautions, drug interactions, adverse reactions, postmarketing experience, and use in renal/hepatic impairment.

access_attempts.result: Full prescribing information accessed through DailyMed.
access_attempts.notes: Used label sections 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, and 8 for safety extraction.
